scripts.build: npm run clean && npm run build:packages && npm run build:apps
scripts.build:apps: tsc -p apps/api/tsconfig.json && tsc -p apps/worker/tsconfig.json && npm --workspace @infralynx/web run build
scripts.build:packages: tsc -p packages/config/tsconfig.json && tsc -p packages/core-domain/tsconfig.json && tsc -p packages/auth-core/tsconfig.json && tsc -p packages/auth-providers/local/tsconfig.json && tsc -p packages/auth-providers/ldap/tsconfig.json && tsc -p packages/auth-providers/oidc/tsconfig.json && tsc -p packages/auth-providers/saml/tsconfig.json && tsc -p packages/auth/tsconfig.json && tsc -p packages/audit/tsconfig.json && tsc -p packages/cache-core/tsconfig.json && tsc -p packages/validation/tsconfig.json && tsc -p packages/backup/tsconfig.json && tsc -p packages/db-abstraction/tsconfig.json && tsc -p packages/db-performance/tsconfig.json && tsc -p packages/performance-tests/tsconfig.json && tsc -p packages/dcim-domain/tsconfig.json && tsc -p packages/domain-core/tsconfig.json && tsc -p packages/ipam-domain/tsconfig.json && tsc -p packages/shared/tsconfig.json && tsc -p packages/job-core/tsconfig.json && tsc -p packages/job-queue/tsconfig.json && tsc -p packages/scheduler/tsconfig.json && tsc -p packages/media-storage/tsconfig.json && tsc -p packages/media-core/tsconfig.json && tsc -p packages/event-core/tsconfig.json && tsc -p packages/webhooks/tsconfig.json && tsc -p packages/network-domain/tsconfig.json && tsc -p packages/data-transfer/tsconfig.json && tsc -p packages/workflow-core/tsconfig.json && tsc -p packages/ui/tsconfig.json
scripts.pretest: npm run clean && npm run build:packages
scripts.typecheck: npm run clean && npm run build:packages && npm run typecheck:apps && npm run typecheck:packages
scripts.typecheck:apps: tsc -p apps/api/tsconfig.json --noEmit --pretty false && tsc -p apps/worker/tsconfig.json --noEmit --pretty false && npm --workspace @infralynx/web run typecheck
scripts.typecheck:packages: tsc -p packages/config/tsconfig.json --noEmit --pretty false && tsc -p packages/core-domain/tsconfig.json --noEmit --pretty false && tsc -p packages/auth-core/tsconfig.json --noEmit --pretty false && tsc -p packages/auth-providers/local/tsconfig.json --noEmit --pretty false && tsc -p packages/auth-providers/ldap/tsconfig.json --noEmit --pretty false && tsc -p
